summary_en: 117,800 shares acquired for ¥119,913,600 over 2026-05-15 to 2026-05-27. Represents 78.5% of ¥120M ceiling and 78.5% of 150,000-share upper limit authorized by board 2026-05-14. Buyback program completed via open-market purchase. 2.3% of issued shares outstanding (ex-treasury).
title_en: Notice on Status of Share Acquisition and Completion of Acquisition (Share repurchase pursuant to Article 165(2) of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: On 28 May 2026, Wagokoro co., ltd. (TSE Growth, Code 9271) reported completion of a share buyback program authorized by board resolution on 14 May 2026. The company acquired 117,800 shares for a total consideration of ¥119,913,600 over the period 15–27 May 2026 (on a contract basis) via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange using a discretionary brokerage arrangement. This represents 2.3% of issued shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The program had an authorized ceiling of 150,000 shares and ¥120,000,000; the company thus consumed 78.5% of both limits before completing the program early. No further share acquisitions under this authorization are planned.
